scripts.typecheck:packages: pnpm exec tsc -p packages/harness-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/harness-browser/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/harness-python/tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/harness-javascript/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test:python-harness-sync: pnpm exec tsx scripts/generate-python-harness-artifacts.ts --check && pnpm exec tsx tests/test-python-harness-sync.ts
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:smoke && pnpm test:trace-adapters && pnpm test:python-harness-sync && pnpm test:javascript-runtime && pnpm test:runtime-contract
